---
title: "Resources"
author: "Paulo Martel"
---

#### Helpers

-   [Python cheat sheet](files/Python_Cheat_Sheet.pdf)

-   [R and Python side by side](files/R_Python_Side_by_Side.pdf)

#### Links

-   [Python Home](https://www.python.org)

-   [Anaconda](https://www.anaconda.org)

#### Datasets

-   [Student grades (.txt)](files/students_grades.txt)

-   [Student grades (.csv)](files/students_grades.csv)

-   [Anscomb Quartet (.txt)](files/anscombes_quartet.txt)

-   [Anscomb Quartet (.json)](files/anscombes_quartet.json)

-   Iris Dataset

-   Embryo Development
